items.text:
skuespillere søges
Hej, vi er en gruppe unge fra filmskolen, Station Next, der er i gang med at producere en kortfilm, og vi søger derfor en dreng og en pige i alderen 15–19 år til frivillige skuespillerroller.

 

Vi leder efter nogen, der har lyst til at tage opgaven seriøst og engagere sig i projektet. Det er en fordel, hvis du har erfaring med skuespil, men det er ikke et krav, det vigtigste er, at du har mod på at prøve og lyst til at være med.

Optagelserne forventes at finde sted i Odder i weekenden den 28.–29. marts.

Hvis det lyder som noget for dig, eller en du kender, så send meget gerne en kort video til min mail, hvor du fortæller lidt om dig selv, f.eks. om du har erfaring med skuespil, og hvad du laver i din fritid.

Du kan kontakte mig her:

Mail: livalinneberg14@gmail.com

Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM “BEA.”

Student Short Film | 10–15 mins | Filming April 12th,13th,14th (1 half day, 2 full days)  | London

A stylised, vibrant reimagining of Dante’s La Vita Nuova and Inferno, exploring projection, devotion, and psychological descent.

Filming will take place in London (church location confirmed).

Unpaid student production. Travel expenses covered. Food provided.

Final university degree showcase project.

🕯 DANTE

Male | 20s–30s | Lead

A poet consumed by idealised devotion. Romantic, obsessive, emotionally intense. Dante lives in his own interior world, separate from the vibrancy around him.

Looking for: • Strong expressive eyes

• Ability to convey longing and internal conflict

• Comfort with stylised, theatrical tone

This role involves emotionally heightened scenes and symbolic physicality.

🪙 SIMONE DE’ BARDI

Male | 20s–30s | Supporting

Beatrice’s husband. A composed, grounded presence. Socially established and emotionally restrained.

Looking for: • Calm, contained energy

• Subtle performance style

• Strong physical presence

Appears in the funeral sequence. Limited but important screen time.

⛪ PRIEST

Male | 18+ (any adult age) | Supporting

A ritual authority figure. Slightly absurd, possibly uncanny. Present during funeral rites and confession sequence.

Looking for: • Character face

• Comfort with stylised tone

• Ability to shift between solemn and subtly unsettling

Minimal dialogue.

🕯 EXTRAS – CHURCHGOERS

All genders | 18+

3–4 extras to portray medieval church attendees.

Looking for: • Neutral physical presence

• Ability to follow direction

• Comfortable in period-inspired costume

Extras will be seated during filming.

🎨 Tone & Style

This is a visually bold, painterly short film. Costuming and colour symbolism are central to the aesthetic. Performances should lean slightly heightened rather than naturalistic realism.

📩 To Apply

Please send: 

• Headshot

• Showreel (if available)

• Availability for April 12th, 13th, 14th

• Location (London-based preferred)

Script: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1X6Ov31u1qnwflExAly46V5JMdvzhvwSiMrTvNAWXrhM/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1X6Ov31u1qnwflExAly46V5JMdvzhvwSiMrTvNAWXrhM/edit?usp=sharing)

*Self Tapes are due March 9th, @12:00am GMT.

Please email: [jbarn007@gold.ac.uk](mailto:jbarn007@gold.ac.uk) pls make sure email has a subject or it may be sent to spam.

Note: Priest and Simone will only be needed for 1 half day, Dante will be required for the whole shoot.  Extras will be needed for 2 half days as they will be playing Beatrice's friends and funeral goers.

items.text:
PROJECT TITLE: When The Bell Rings
PROJECT TYPE: Student-Led Psychological Horror Short Film

LOCATION: Winchester / Andover, Hampshire, UK

SHOOT DATES: 23/03/2026 – 05/04/2026

(Exact shoot days & call times will vary depending on role.)

AUDITION DEADLINE: 07/03/2026

⸻

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:

When The Bell Rings is a psychological horror short exploring identity, vulnerability, and the dangerous pull of belonging. The story follows a group of young adults drawn into a mysterious cult led by a powerful and unsettling figure.

This is a student-led project and a great opportunity for actors looking to gain on-set experience and footage for their showreel.

All ethnicities and backgrounds are encouraged to apply. Visual references are tonal only and not reflective of required physical appearance.

⸻

ROLES AVAILABLE:

• ALEX (Male, 19–25) – Protagonist. Shy, introspective, emotionally vulnerable.

• KENNEDY (Female, 19–25) – Emotional anchor. Quiet, secretive, internally conflicted.

• SAM (Female, 19–25) – Voice of reason. Grounded, assertive, morally driven.

• RODRICK (Male, 19–25) – Best friend. Confident, laid back, loyal.

• IRIS (Female, 19–25) – Geeky, witty, emotionally reactive.

• BEN (Male, 19–25) – Comedic relief. Relaxed, impulsive.

• PRINCIPLE (Female, 40–65) – Antagonist. Controlled, commanding, authoritative presence.

• CULT TEACHER (Any gender, 30+) – Small speaking role (1 line).

• CULT MEMBERS (Any gender, 18+) – Background roles (some with lines).

You may apply for multiple roles.

⸻

PAYMENT: Unpaid (Student Production)

EXPENSES: Food provided. Travel expenses covered (with receipt).

⸻

CONTACT DETAILS:

Production Team – When The Bell Rings

Email: whenthebellringsshortfilm@gmail.com

Instagram: @when_the_bell_rings

Please email or DM with your headshot, playing age, location, character and any relevant showreel/Spotlight link.

items.text:
**045  Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 3 Oficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli trzeciego oficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 2 3 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy dziewczyny 18 – 20 lat do roli Eli**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje dziewczyny 18 – 20 lat młodo wyglądającej do roli Eli najlepiej mieszkającej w Gliwicach lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice najdalej ) Postać będzie mieć dialogi po polsku. Szukamy osób bez farbowanych włosów czy malowanych paznokciach.

 

Młoda 20 letnia** **dziewczyna. Wysoka i szczupła o długich włosach. W czasie okupacji niemieckiej razem z Stefanem i Wandą uczestniczą w kilku akcjach patriotycznych ,które na celu mają m.in. klejenie na murach plakatów. Podczas jednej z akcji ratuje Wandę i Stefana przed śmiercią z ręki niemieckiego żołnierza strzelając do niego z broni ojca wcześniej pożyczonej. Podkochuje się w Stefanie ale nie mówi mi tego na początku.

** **

Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
#castingcall

Could you be our Frank Sinatra or Sammy Davis Jr.?

The Brookside Theatre is staging THAT'S LIFE - The Rat Pack musical  in April and we are on the lookout for 2 male performers for these iconic roles...

We are looking for performers who can act and sing like Frank and Sammy but they do not need to look like them ....

Also looking for 3 female singers who can deliver close harmonies as the Seraph Sisters 

Venue: Brookside Theatre Romford 

Show w/c 30th March

Rehearsals March 2026 in Romford by a schedule

Profit share production 

For info pack please PM me or email casting@brooksidetheatre.com

#casting #ratpack #FrankSinatra #SammyDavisJr #audition

items.text:
## 🎭 **COACHES GESUCHT – Musicalschule Bühnen:Zeit (Rhein-Main)**

Für unsere Musicalschule **Bühnen:Zeit** in **Kriftel (Hessen)** suchen wir aktuell **professionell ausgebildete bzw. tätige Künstler:innen** als Coaches in den Bereichen

🎤 **Gesang**
💃 **Tanz**
🎭 **Schauspiel**

Wir arbeiten mit **Kindern und Jugendlichen im Alter von 4–18 Jahren** in altersgerechten Gruppen und realisieren regelmäßig **Musical- und Bühnenprojekte**.
✨ **Was wir uns wünschen**
* künstlerische Ausbildung oder professionelle Bühnenerfahrung
* Interesse an der **pädagogischen Arbeit mit Kindern & Jugendlichen**
* Zuverlässigkeit, Teamfähigkeit und Freude an kreativer Zusammenarbeit
✨ **Was wir bieten**
* wertschätzende, professionelle Arbeitsatmosphäre
* honorarbasierte Zusammenarbeit
* kreative Projekte und langfristige Perspektiven

📩 **Interesse?**
Dann freuen wir uns über eine kurze Nachricht oder eine Bewerbung mit Vita an
👉 **bewerbung@buehnenzeit.de**

🌐 [www.buehnenzeit.de](http://www.buehnenzeit.de/)

Gerne teilen – vielen Dank ⭐️

items.text:
Raum NRW: Ruhrgebiet, Düsseldorf, Köln und Umgebung

Ich bin angehender Hobbyfotograf aus dem Raum Krefeld/Düsseldorf und suche Menschen, die Lust auf ein lockeres, unkompliziertes Fotoshooting haben. Vorkenntnisse oder Erfahrung sind nicht nötig – wir probieren alles in Ruhe gemeinsam aus, ohne Erwartungen oder Druck.

Den Ort wählen wir zusammen: Park, Wasser, Stadt oder ein Platz, an dem du dich wohlfühlst. Alle Bilder bekommst du in hoher Auflösung, einige bearbeite ich dezent und natürlich.

Ich habe außerdem eine kleine Portfolio-Seite, die sich noch im Aufbau befindet:
[http://jpegwerkstatt.com/](http://jpegwerkstatt.com/)

Wichtig ist mir ausdrücklich: **Modelmaße, Figur oder Aussehen spielen für mich keinerlei Rolle.** Fotografie hat für mich nichts mit Idealbildern zu tun. Besonders Frauen sollen sich ermutigt fühlen, sich zu zeigen, ohne sich zu schämen oder etwas erfüllen zu müssen.

Da ich selbst Anfänger bin, suche ich **ausschließlich Hobby-Models oder Menschen ohne Erfahrung**, die es einfach ausprobieren möchten. **Profi- oder Agentur-Models bitte nicht anfragen.**

Ich bin im Umkreis von etwa 50–60 km um Krefeld/Düsseldorf mobil.

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht.😊

items.text:
🎬 Casting Call — Sweet Minute Productions (Indie Feature Film)
Sweet Minute Productions is seeking actors for an upcoming indie feature film. This project is designed to give emerging talent meaningful experience on a professional film set, with plans for release on streaming platforms.
Roles Needed
 • Women who can portray early 20s
 • Men who can portray ages 25–30
About the Production
Sweet Minute Productions is known for creating a supportive, collaborative environment where new actors can grow, learn, and build their portfolios. We’re passionate about helping fresh talent break into the industry.
Project Details
 • Genre: Indie Feature Film
 • Schedule: Flexible shoot dates
 • Target Start: Mid-March
 • Compensation: Dependent on role and discussed individually
 • Location: Chicago & TBD suburbs accessible by train if needed!
How to Apply
If you’re interested, send me a PM!  
Please include:
 • Your name
 • Age range
 • Recent photo or headshot
 • Any acting experience (not required)

topComments.text: I’m interested how do I get in contact with you? I can’t through Facebook message.

Hey y'all, need a make up artist for our short film shooting on March 3rd, (8 hours) 4th (6 hours),  10th (12 hours),  & 11th (6 hours). 

$50 a day + copy meal & credit. 

March 3rd specifically our male lead would need to be aged to look as if he's in his 50-60's. 

All scenes are outdoors. 

Please DM if interested or tag any artist looking to expand their portfolio. Happy to answer any questions and provide further details. 

Thanks in advance.

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – No-Budget Comedy Spot (Manga-Style)**

**Arbeitstitel:** „Das Pizza-Finale“
**Drehort:** Köln
**Drehtermin:** 07.03.2026 (Samstag)
**Uhrzeit:** 14 Uhr
**Format:** Werbespot im Manga-/Anime-Stil
**Genre:** Comedy, situative Rivalität

Für einen humorvollen Werbespot suchen wir drei spielfreudige Darsteller:innen aus Köln mit starkem mimischem Ausdruck und sehr gutem Gespür für Timing.

Die Szene lebt von intensiven Blicken, inneren Monologen (V.O.) und überzeichneter „Battle“-Dramatik im Manga-Stil. Gesucht werden Persönlichkeiten, die Alltagssituationen mit epischer Ernsthaftigkeit spielen können.

**Logline:**

Ein harmloses Pizzaessen eskaliert komödiantisch zu einem stillen Wettkampf um das letzte Stück.

**🍕 JOHAN**

**Spielalter:** 20–35
**Typ:** Ehrgeiziger, leicht überambitionierter Typ mit Comedy-Talent
**Aussehen:** Blond, schlank, leicht nerdiger Look, kurze Haare, europäischer Typ. Gern Brillenträger.

**Charakter:**
Johan nimmt harmlose Situationen viel zu ernst. In seinem Kopf wird das letzte Pizzastück zum epischen Endkampf. Er ist analytisch, kompetitiv – aber auf sympathische, leicht überdrehte Weise.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Mimik (intensive Close-ups), gutes Timing für Voice-Over-Texte, körperliche Comedy (Speed-Eating, Blickduell).

**🍕 MARIO**

**Spielalter:** 30–45
**Typ:** Selbstbewusster, ruhiger Gegenspieler mit natürlicher Autorität
**Aussehen:** Kräftige oder leicht muskulöse Statur, schwarze Haare, asiatischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Mario ist der gelassene Stratege. Er sagt wenig, kommentiert aber innerlich alles im Voice-Over. Sein Humor ist trocken, sein Blick maximal ernst – zumindest in seiner eigenen Vorstellung.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Präsenz, subtile Komik, intensiver Blickkontakt. Fähigkeit, Überdramatisierung mit absoluter Ernsthaftigkeit zu spielen.

**🍕 KERSTIN**

**Spielalter:** 25–40
**Typ:** Smart, ruhig, fashion-bewusst – mit starkem Comedy-Instinkt
**Aussehen:** Schlank, eher klein, stilvoller Look, braune Haare; europäischer oder südamerikanischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Während die beiden Männer sich in ihrem inneren Endkampf verlieren, beobachtet Kerstin alles entspannt – nur um im perfekten Moment das letzte Stück zu nehmen. Sie ist die stille Siegerin.

**Anforderung:**
Natürliches Spiel, feines Timing, selbstbewusste Ausstrahlung. Der Humor entsteht aus ihrer Gelassenheit.

Einen Eindruck unserer bisherigen Arbeiten findet Ihr unter:
https://www.visuzfilms.com/

Das Projekt wird ohne Budget umgesetzt. Eine Vergütung sowie die Übernahme von Fahrt- oder Unterkunftskosten sind daher leider nicht möglich.

Wir bieten jedoch ein engagiertes Team, kreative Zusammenarbeit und hochwertiges Material für das eigene Showreel.

Für Verpflegung am Set ist selbstverständlich gesorgt – inklusive Pizza 🍕

 

**📩 Bewerbung & Kontakt**

Bitte sendet eure Bewerbung mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Showreel (falls vorhanden)
* Instagram / facebook (falls vorhanden)

an:
**E-Mail: visuzfilms@gmail.com**
Betreff: *Casting „Das Pizza-Finale“ – Rollenname*

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

Mein Schwerpunkt liegt auf kommerziellen Projekten, bei denen ich stets eine klare...

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
While reviewing auditions I constantly see that learning editing is needed BIGTIME! Let's get your tapes looking awesome!

This Saturday's VIRTUAL workshop focuses on helping actors **professionally edit their auditions and reels,** regardless of the device you use.

ALSO, I'm going to share some significant ways **actors can save money** on Actors Access and Casting Networks so you can invest that money in yourself (and your everyday lives).

As always this workshop is only **$37 or free **with your Climbing The Call Sheet membership ($27/month). Registration is easy at www.ClimbingTheCallSheet.com

Have an awesome week and let me know if you have any questions.

items.text:
Hi there 👋🏻😃
I’m Freya Tingley, an Australian actress keen to connect with filmmakers who are developing or heading into production on proof-of-concept shorts, features, or series.

I’m particularly interested in collaborating with legitimate, funded projects, or attaching early to strong scripts that are seeking finance.

My work includes Netflix’s Hemlock Grove, playing Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time, working with Clint Eastwood on Jersey Boys, voicing a lead role in Netflix’s DOTA, and leading six feature films including the horror titles The Sonata and Time Addicts (currently streaming on Netflix).

I can work in the US, UK, and Australia, and I’m currently based in Australia.

My showreel is available on IMDb:

imdb.me/freyatingley

If you have a project in mind — I’d love to connect!

Freya

items.text:
I’m looking for 3 actors for a short film about free will. This is a quick interview style shoot. About 30 minutes per actor.
Roles
1 female, white, 30s
1 male, Latinx, 40s
1 male, white, 40s
You will need to memorize about one page of script. It will be shot as an on camera interview.
If you are interested, DM me your headshot and a reel link if you have one, plus your availability.

Casting-Ausschreibung – Darstellerin gesucht (Filmszene, nicht öffentlich)

Für den Dreh einer Filmszene suchen wir eine Darstellerin (blond) im Alter von 20 bis ca. 35 Jahren.

Wichtig: Nutzung / Veröffentlichung

Die Szene ist ausschließlich für ein Lokal im Ausland bestimmt

Keine Veröffentlichung im Internet, TV oder auf öffentlichen Plattformen 

Dreh-Inhalt

Szene in verschiedenen sexy Kostümen

Professioneller Dreh, klarer Ablauf

Drehorte

Sachsen (1 Szene)

Kempten im Allgäu (1 Szene)

Vergütung

400 € pro Drehtag (jeweils halber Tag)

Anonymität möglich

Auf Wunsch ohne Gesicht drehbar

items.text:
Du modelst gerne und fühlst dich der schwarzen Szene nicht abgeneigt?

Für ein Fotoshooting zur Präsentation unseres Band-Merchandisings suchen wir ein ausdrucksstarkes Model mit starker Präsenz, Sinn für düstere Ästhetik und Freude daran, den Stil und die Atmosphäre unserer Musik visuell zum Leben zu erwecken.

Wir sind die **Arbeitsgruppe Lobotomie** – eine elektronische Rock- und Metalband, die weder an Gesellschaftskritik noch an beißendem Humor und Provokation spart. Einen ersten Eindruck kannst du dir gerne über unsere durchgeknallten Videos auf YouTube verschaffen.

Erfahrung vor der Kamera ist von Vorteil, aber kein Muss. Wichtig sind Ausstrahlung, Kreativität und Lust auf ein außergewöhnliches Projekt.
Das Shooting findet in **München** statt. Wenn du aus dem Umkreis kommst, Spaß am Modeln hast und Teil eines kreativen Bandprojekts werden möchtest, freuen wir uns sehr über deine Bewerbung.

Schreib mir bei Interesse einfach eine Nachricht über **Facebook**. 😊

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON
Paid | Self-Funded Coming-of-Age Short Film
Seeking 2 Young Actors (Ages 16–20)
1 Male
1 Female
All races, backgrounds and sexualities welcome

No professional acting experience is required. We welcome both new and experienced performers — authenticity, emotional openness and a willingness to explore vulnerable material are what matter most.

This short film explores the confusing, embarrassing and often uncomfortable space between childhood and adulthood. It centres on a young couple (playing ages 14–16) caught in that in-between stage — desperate to feel grown, yet still surrounded by glitter-covered bedroom walls and the remains of childhood.
The story captures exaggerated, half-true conversations about sex, red spots on foreheads, bra straps hanging over vest tops as quiet markers of newfound womanhood, and boys beginning to see girls less as friends and more as something to strive toward. It examines the awkward performance of maturity — wanting to feel adult, sensual and independent while your body, confidence and environment have not yet caught up. The tone is tender, edgy and uncomfortably honest.

Inspired by Palo Alto and Me and Earl and the Dying Girl, the film combines naturalistic performances with a stylised yet grounded portrayal of youth and vulnerability.

Requirements:
Must believably play 14–16, No visible tattoos, no non-removable piercings (ears and one nose piercing acceptable.) Comfortable with narration and mildly explicit teenage themes, Able to travel to London locations
Paid (low day rate – self-funded student production)

About the Director:
My name is Molly Sheridan and I am a final-year Film student at Central Saint Martins. My work focuses on youth, identity and the subtle emotional shifts that define formative years. I am particularly drawn to stories that sit in uncomfortable, transitional spaces — where characters are trying to become something new but are not quite there yet. This project marks my first larger-scale production, and I am building a collaborative team of emerging creatives. I am committed to creating a safe, open working environment where actors feel supported in delivering honest, vulnerable performances.

To apply, please send a headshot, your age and a few details about yourself. If you have a showreel, you are welcome to include that as well.

Contact: greenladyproduction05@gmail.com 
If you have any questions or would like more information, please do not hesitate to get in contact. Scripts and relevant production documents will be sent directly to selected applicants following initial conversations.

items.text:
# *****CASTING CALL (SMALL PAY, BELFAST)*****

# **BLACK DOG**

*A troubled vigilante spends his nights patrolling the city streets and fighting criminals, all the while being haunted by visions of a black dog that push him towards self-destruction.*

**Short film** casting **four male supporting actors** to play a rag-tag gang of criminals for a pivotal **fight sequence** and recurring presence in the film.

***BIGMAN*** (40s to 50s)

The de facto leader. Calm, experienced, pragmatic. Carries authority within the group.

***GRUMBLE*** (20s to 40s)

Practical. Complains often, but gets the job done. Quick temper.

***LADYKILLER*** (20s to 30s)

Flashier, image-conscious, slightly cocky. Reacts emotionally when things turn violent.

***BABYFACE*** (20s to 30s)

Youngest energy of the group. Alert, anxious, reactive. Acts as a lookout during operations.

# **Fight scene required**
* All roles involve a choreographed, physical fight scene with the lead actor.
* Actors must be comfortable with staged violence, falling to the ground and staged injuries.
* Any experience in stage combat, stunt work, boxing, wrestling or physical theatre is welcome but not essential.
* All combat will be thoroughly rehearsed and choreographed to ensure on-set safety.

# **Production details**
* QUB film Master’s dissertation project.
* Small, token payment included.
* Travel covered and catering provided.
* **All experience levels welcome**.
* **Ages are flexible**.
* Filming in Belfast across several nights in late March/early April.

Contact us at:
# **daniel-bingham@hotmail.co.uk**

* Any experience in stage combat, stunt work, boxing, wrestling or physical theatre is welcome but not essential.
* All combat will be thoroughly rehearsed and choreographed to ensure on-set safety.

# **Production details**
* QUB film Master’s dissertation project.
* Small, token payment included.
* Travel covered and catering provided.
* **All experience levels welcome**.
* **Ages are flexible**.
* Filming in Belfast across several nights in late March/early April.

Contact us at:
# **daniel-bingham@hotmail.co.uk**
items.title: # *****CASTING CALL (SMALL PAY, BELFAST)*****

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — JEFFERSON DAVIS (MILES MORALES’S FATHER) 🎬

We are casting the role of Jefferson Davis for our upcoming Spider-Man fan project. This is a major supporting role portraying a dedicated father, respected police officer, and moral anchor in Miles’s life. We are seeking an actor who can embody strength, authority, warmth, and emotional depth.

⭐ CHARACTER DESCRIPTION (COMIC-ACCURATE LOOK REQUIRED)
• Ethnicity: Black / African American
• Age Range: 40s to 50s (appearance)
• Height: Average to above average
• Build: Average to solid, strong presence
• Hair: Shaved head / bald
• Facial Hair: Full dark beard (well-maintained)
• Eyes: Brown
• Wardrobe Style: Textured olive-green or brown cardigan-style jacket with large brown buttons worn over a white collared shirt
• Overall Presence: Commanding, grounded, protective, disciplined, and deeply caring

🎭 PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS
• Strong dramatic acting ability
• Convincing portrayal of a principled father and law enforcement officer
• Natural authority with emotional range
• Comfortable with dialogue-heavy and heartfelt scenes

📍 PRODUCTION DETAILS
• Project Type: Spider-Man fan film
• Filming Location: [South Ockendon Essex]
• Shooting Dates: [5th March 2026 time 1:00pm]
• Compensation: [Paid ] via PayPal or bank transfer ￼

📩 HOW TO AUDITION
Send the following:
• Headshot and full-body photo
• Acting reel or recent self-tape
• Name, age, height, and acting experience

Submit via DM or email: [ppeterb954@gmail.com]

Help us bring this iconic father figure to life. If you have the presence, strength, and heart — we want to see you.

sharedPost.text:
Masz od 18 do 40 lat? Na scenie czujesz się jak ryba w wodzie, a śpiew to Twój sposób na wyrażenie siebie? Szukamy właśnie Ciebie!

Nasz konkurs skierowany jest do młodych wokalistów i aktorów, którzy chcą dzielić się tym, co im w duszy gra, a za pomocą piosenki aktorskiej potrafią opowiedzieć własną, autentyczną historię. To szansa na świetne nagrody, spotkanie z profesjonalnym jury i występ przed szeroką publicznością. 

Pokaż nam swój talent i autorski pomysł na teksty Jonasza Kofty. Niech Twoja interpretacja stanie się częścią jubileuszowej, 10. edycji festiwalu OFF-Północna!

Jak się zgłosić? To proste:
1️⃣ Przygotuj dwa nagrania wideo: jeden dowolny utwór ze spektrum piosenki aktorskiej oraz jeden z tekstem Jonasza Kofty.
2️⃣ Wypełnij formularz zgłoszeniowy 👉 https://tinyurl.com/KPA2026
3️⃣ Wyślij swoje zgłoszenie!

Wszystkie szczegóły i regulamin znajdziesz tutaj:
👉 https://www.offpolnocna.com/konkurskofty 

Nie zwlekaj – czas na zgłoszenia mija 𝟭𝟱 𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗰𝗮!

CASTING CALL- LOS ANGELES PLAY

Hey y’all!! My 10 minute play got into a play festival called Script Shuffle 2026 and we’re looking to cast someone in the LA area!! 

All we need is a masculine presenting person (any gender) who looks younger to play Child, a 10 year old version of an adult who child is having a conversation with. 

The play is a conversation between an adult and his child self as they share memories and offer advice about life and growing up!

The mandatory dates are tech on Tuesday the 7th and the performances are April 8th and April 10th!

If you or if you know someone who might be interested, please email joshuamedinaentertainment@gmail.com with your headshot & resume for sides!!

items.text:
**🎬CASTING CALL: “Let’s Talk Medicare” Educational Video Series**

**Production Company:** Playfish Media
**Client:** UCLA Health Medicare Advantage Plan (UHMAP)
**Role:** On Camera Host / Medicare Advocate
**Union Status:** Non-union
**Shoot Duration:** One full-day
**Shoot Dates:** April 1, 2, or 3, (exact date TBD)
**Filming Location:** Seattle, WA
**Usage Term:** 3 years, regional to Los Angeles County

[Playfish Media](http://playfishmedia.com/) is seeking a warm, relatable on camera host for a five part educational video series for UCLA Health Medicare Advantage Plan. Each video will run approximately two minutes and will also be edited into shorter :30 and :15 cutdowns for use across multiple digital platforms.

**PROJECT OVERVIEW**

“Let’s Talk Medicare” is designed to provide clear, accessible guidance on important Medicare topics. The host will speak directly to camera, helping simplify complex information and build trust with viewers seeking straightforward answers about their healthcare options.

**SEEKING**

Female talent, ages 50 to 65. Hispanic, or Hispanic presenting. Talent should appear healthy, warm, trustworthy, and confident, with a natural and conversational delivery style. We are looking for someone who feels like a knowledgeable, relatable guide, like a friend offering helpful advice, without coming across as overly scripted or sales driven.

Strong direct to camera skills are required. Must be comfortable using a teleprompter and able to deliver scripted material clearly in easily understandable English.

**TRAVEL**

Filming will take place in Seattle, WA. Local talent is encouraged to submit, but nationwide casting is open. Travel and accommodations will be provided if needed.

**USAGE**

Content will run for three years, regional to Los Angeles County. Distribution includes digital and online platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Nextdoor, paid social advertising, online video and connected TV, website landing pages, and internal training use.

**DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENT**

Talent must disclose any previous representation, endorsement, or appearance in advertising for Medicare related brands, including but not limited to Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare, or SCAN, at the time of submission.

**RATE**

$1,000 shoot day
$3,750 usage
+ Agency fees (if applicable)

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit a self taped audition using the provided script sample, along with headshot and resume.

**Subject line: **“Let’s Talk Medicare”
**Email:** talent@playfishmedia.com
**Submission deadline:** March 3rd

**SCRIPT SAMPLE**

*“Hi there! If you’re new to Medicare, UCLA Health Medicare*

*Advantage Plan is here to help you get started.*

*It’s important to understand Medicare eligibility requirements.*

*Most people become eligible for Medicare when they turn 65.*

*People under 65, with a qualifying disability, may also be eligible.”*

Poszukuje aktora:

Wiek: 18-20 lat 

Umiejętności: dobra gra na gitarze elektrycznej.

Profil: osoba o dużej ekspresji twarzy, potrafiąca oddać stany emocjonalne bez słów.

Proszę przesyłać zgłoszenia na adres e-mail: pomykala.film@gmail.com

W tytule: Imię Nazwisko - Gitarzysta.

W treści: Aktualne zdjęcie oraz krótkie nagranie (self-tape) prezentujące grę na gitarze.

🎬 CASTING DO SERIALU „Ukryta Prawda”
Szukamy do roli Kuba Bojke (około 39 lat): Przedstawiciel handlowy, rozwiedziony ojciec kilkuletniej córki. Zawala obowiązki, imprezuje, ma problemy finansowe. W głębi dobry człowiek, który próbuje stanąć na nogi i być lepszym ojcem.
📍 Zdjęcia: 18–20.03 (3 dni zdjęciowe), Warszawa i okolice
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 1800 zł za całość
📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać przez formularz: https://shortaudition.com/zgloszenie
lub mailowo: casting@constantin-entertainment.pl

items.text:
Hello all! We are a group of CU Denver Student filmmakers shooting a project March 20th-22nd. 

**TITLE:** The Last Supper 

**GENRE:** Psychological Horror 

**LOGLINE:** A young woman's first dinner with her wealthy fiancee's family reveals a disturbing ritual.

**ROLES:**

*Evelyn Hernandez* (20's, Latina, Female): A young Latina woman stepping into her fiancee's world for the first time. Evelyn is confident, strong, kind, intelligent, and deeply in love. Everything a family could possibly ask for...if she fits the mold.

*Andrew O'Neill* (20's, White, Male) Evelyn's charming, pristine fiancee. He knows exactly how to make Evelyn feel safe. Raised in a family that values tradition above all else.

*Nicole O'Neill* (40's-60's, White, Female): The O'Neill family's cold, controlling matriarch. A mother who values tradition, appearances, and 'what's best'.

*Bruce O'Neill *(40s-60s, White, Male): The O'Neill family's smug and detached patriarch.

*Milan Garcia* (20's-40's, Latina, Female): Older Latina woman and maid for the O'Neill family. Doesn't say much, but she is not complacent.

**Director/Writer**: Bella Urrutia 

**Producer**: Christine Galvez 

**Production Type:** Student Film 

**Contact Information**: Please contact by email christinegalve.zfilms@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (8-10 minutes)

**Compensation**: Unpaid

**Union Status:** Non-Union 

**Audition Information**: Auditions via self tape only, reviewing and casting will be finalized early March 

**Shooting Schedule:** March 20th-22nd

**Filming Location**: Denver/Wheat Ridge area, some locations subject to change

**If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link:**

*Audition Form: *https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeiTpaVjnaciNRaruclFMvJFpIAM4pICGlnKLgbNaeYe9wMNw/viewform?usp=header* *

*Sides:*

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/181sc9BycsKa9u3_ixd-H6Zj4Ms7e1VlP?usp=sharing 

**Any further inquiries please feel free to email.**

items.text:
**TITLE**: The Jackal’s Office

**GENRE**: Drama

**LOGLINE**: Set in a bureaucratic afterlife, The Jackal’s Office is a take on the weighing of the heart ceremony with the Egyptian god, Anubis.

**ROLES**:

**JACK**- M, 20s-40s. Tailored, forthright, weigher of hearts.

**MILO**- M, 20s. Gruff, self-regarding, recently deceased.

**Production Company**: Poison Ink Productions, Dir. Aiden Villarreal

**Production Type**: Short Film

**Contact Information**: poisoninkproductions@gmail.com

**Run Time**: Short

**Compensation**: Unpaid. Reel footage, meals, and snacks provided.

**Union Status**: Non-Union

**Audition Information**: Please submit through QR code, or through this link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdF5cfG3jvJ2byKe6belFQlGRx1zm2Qa88__m9tFAB8DVT4RQ/viewform

Self tape auditions due by the evening of Sunday, March 1st.

Sides are attached to link above.

**Shooting Schedule**: March 14th &15th

**Filming Location**: Denver

items.text:
**045  Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 Oficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli oficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 –Szukamy mężczyzny do roli Heinrich’a Himmlera!**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzny w wieku 40 lat , podobnego do Himmlera pod projekt mini serialu osadzonym w 1939 i 1940 roku w obwodzie klatki100 cmi pasie 90/95.  Mile widziane chęci stworzenia podobnej fryzury do tej historycznej postaci, szczególnie bardzo krótkich boków głowy, charakterystycznych.**

** **

 Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest  na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach jak na zdjęciach. W projekcie **planujemy 6 odcinków**, w tym w 3 jest postać Himmlera.

 

Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

🎬 SUCHE Ü50 MANN ALS DOKTOR FÜR MUSIKVIDEO (BERLIN) 🎬
Für einen Musikvideodreh in Berlin suche ich einen aufgeschlossenen Mann Ü50, der die Rolle eines Doktors übernimmt.
📅 Datum: 25.01.2026
⏱ Dauer: ca. 4–5 Stunden
📍 Ort: Berlin
🩺 Zur Rolle / Story:
Die Storyline des Musikvideos dreht sich um eine große Schönheits-OP der Künstlerin.
Der gesuchte Mann spielt den Doktor, gemeinsam mit einer bekannten Influencerin, die die Krankenschwester verkörpert.
🎶 Projekt:
– Musikvideo
– zusätzlicher Content für TikTok & Social Media
🌈 WICHTIG:
Die Künstlerin ist trans.
Daher ist es unbedingt notwendig, dass du weltoffen, respektvoll bist und kein Problem mit queeren Menschen hast.
💸 Budget:
Leider kein Honorar möglich.
Dafür:
– Credits
– Verpflegung
– ein kreatives, positives Set
– Reichweite durch Social Media Content
👤 Voraussetzungen:
– Ü50
– offen, sympathisch, zuverlässig
– keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig
📩 Interesse?
Dann melde dich direkt hier per Nachricht
oder auf Instagram:
👉 https://www.instagram.com/echtjetztkimberly
Freue mich sehr über Nachrichten & Weiterempfehlungen 💖✨

Schauspieler / Darsteller für Produktplatzierung gesucht 🎬
Hallo zusammen,

ich suche Männer oder Frauen (bevorzugt 35–45+) für eine Produktplatzierung im Bereich Gesundheit & Wohlbefinden.

Es geht um ein Produkt zur Anwendung bei Nacken- und Rückenschmerzen sowie allgemeinen Beschwerden im Oberkörper.

 • Natürlich, ruhig, alltagstauglich

 •     Kein Studio, Authentizität steht im Vordergrund.

 • Nutzung des Materials für    Werbeanzeigen (Social Media Ads)

 • Kameraerfahrung von Vorteil, aber kein Muss

 • Standort egal 🌍

Bei Interesse bitte Privatnachricht mit kurzen Infos zu dir (gerne mit Referenzen).

topComments.text: Hallo! Ich habe im Jänner bei euch einen Vertrag für diese Content Videos unterschrieben und ihr meldet euch aber nicht mehr. Ich habe kein Massage Kissen erhalten, keine Sendungsnummer, keine Sendungsmethode. Keine Antwort mehr auf Messenger wo ich Vertrag unterschrieb. Ich habe euch 2 E-Mails geschickt und und keine Antwort von euch bekommen. Hätte ich diese Fotos und Videos gerne gemacht. Habt ihr mich vergessen? Tina Christina Krabath Schauspielerin

items.text:
ISO: Casting for Chapman MFA Short 

**Project Title:** *Take a Little Time*

**Project Type:** Student Short Film 

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Genre:** Coming of Age/ Musical Drama

**Length:** ~10 minutes

**Producer:** Kexin Tang

**Co-Written & Directed by:** Mackenzie Baumert

**Production Type:** Independent / Student

**Shoot Location:** [Los Angeles, CA]

**Shoot Dates:** [April 3-5,2026]

**Compensation:** Copy, meals, credit

We are committed to diverse, inclusive casting. For every role, please submit qualified performers, without regard to disability, gender, race and ethnicity, age, color, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity or any other basis prohibited by law.

SYNOPSIS:  AFTER A DISAPPOINTING AUDITION IN NEW YORK, A DRIVEN YOUNG PERFORMER RETURNS HOME TO TEXAS, WHERE RECONNECTING WITH HER MUSICIAN FATHER HELPS HER REDISCOVER HER VOICE - AND REDEFINE WHAT SUCCESS REALLY MEANS.

**DEAN GAIN **

**Male | 50s | Open Ethnicity | LEAD**

Melanie’s father. A warm, charismatic local musician with an easy sense of humor and deep emotional intelligence. When his daughter comes home, Dean battles his agency as her dad, whether he should push her towards picking up a guitar again and writing music like she used to love, or if he should stay quiet and allow her to discover her own voice. 

**Singing and guitar-playing REQUIRED. Please submit all instruments played. **

**JAMES **

**Male | 50s | Open Ethnicity | SUPPORTING**

Dean’s longtime music partner and close friend. Easygoing, warm, and quietly observant. James loves Dean like a brother and thus loves Melanie, he struggles to best support Melanie as she closes off, and properly support Dean as his friend. 

**Singing and guitar-playing preferred.**

**CASTING AGENT **

**Any Gender | 30s–50s | Open Ethnicity | DAY PLAYER**

Organized and observant individual that values efficiency and helping directors find the perfect cast. Struggles to feel empathetic towards those auditioning for them. 

**DIRECTOR **

**Any Gender | 30s–50s | Open Ethnicity | BACKGROUND**

Quiet, observant, and authoritative. Limited dialogue. Has a strong sense of their creative desires, and doesn’t care much about the emotions of those that walk in the room. 
**ACCOMPANIST**

**Any Gender | 30s–60s | Open Ethnicity | BACKGROUND**

A neutral, experienced presence in the audition room.
**Keyboard skills required.**

***EXTRAS ***

***BETWEEN THE AGES OF 20-30 for an audition scene.  (FEMALE IDENTIFYING) (3-4 TOTAL)***

***AND/OR 20-60s to play in a country bar scene. (ANY GENDER) (10-15 TOTAL)***

Please submit a headshot, resumé, and acting reel (and music sample of choice if specified for role) to [ketang@chapman.edu](mailto:ketang@chapman.edu) AND [baumert@chapman.edu](mailto:baumert@chapman.edu) by 03/10/2026. Self tape requests/zoom auditions will be requested after this date. Thanks!

sharedPost.text:
✨ CALL FOR VOLUNTEER PERFORMERS ✨

WOOM is back to work in association with the Adelaide Hunter Hoodless Homestead, and is seeking volunteer performers for Summer Milk, an evocative pre-recorded audio walk experience.

🌾 About the Project
Summer Milk invites audiences to step outside of time and journey through the Homestead alongside Jane Hamilton Hunter, reliving intimate memories of motherhood and the extraordinary woven into everyday life. This is not a linear biography, but a walk through memory — tender, reflective, and deeply human.

🎭 Performer Role
Performers will collaboratively devise physical scores of movement, gesture, and action (not dance) to embody these memories under the direction of Holly B Wood.

📍 Details

Rehearsals: Once weekly at the Homestead in St. George

Performances: May 16–17, 2026

Auditions: Saturday, March 7, 2026 | 11 AM–4 PM

Location: Adelaide Hunter Hoodless Homestead
359 Blue Lake Rd, St. George, ON

🔗 Book your audition:
https://calendar.app.google/B5cMjJQrXKhXeQz87

Can’t attend in person? Virtual auditions are available.
📧 Contact Stage Manager Jasmine Romany with questions or to book virtually: j.romany@hotmail.com

Come help us bring memory to life. 💫

#WOOMcollaborative #SummerMilk #CallForPerformers #KWArts #SiteSpecificPerformance AudioWalk VolunteerPerformers

items.text:
🎭 AUDITION I OSLO – ER DU MELLOM 14–20 ÅR?

Momentum Company søker skuespillere og dansere til forestillingen Dymphna – en sterk og aktuell danse- og teaterproduksjon med fokus på mental helse.

Vi ser etter deg som ønsker å stå på scenen og være en del av en meningsfull produksjon sammen med et dedikert kunstnerisk team.

✨ Hvem kan søke?
• Skuespillere og/eller dansere
• Spillealder 14–20 år

📍 Audition:
Onsdag 25. mars i Oslo
(Tidspunkt og eksakt adresse sendes til de som blir invitert.)

🎬 Om forestillingen
Dymphna utforsker temaer rundt mental helse og fortelles gjennom en kombinasjon av dans, monologer og fysisk scenearbeid.
Vi søker:
• 1 kvinnelig hovedrolle
• 2 mannlige hovedroller
• Ensemble (dansere og skuespillere)

Dette er en uhonorert produksjon, men gir verdifull sceneerfaring og tett samarbeid med et profesjonelt og engasjert kunstnerisk team.

🎨 Kunstnerisk team:
*  Theo Sundby – Koreograf & regissør
* Oda Øverjordet– Produsent & regissør
* Marius Mjelve Kristiansen – Produsent & regissør

Alle som melder seg på vil få svar, uansett utfall.

👉 Interessert? Meld deg på via linken under!
Del gjerne med noen som du synes burde søke!

items.text:
## **🎬 CASTING CALL – PAID ROLES (£550 Each)**

📍 **London (On-Set Shoot)**

📅 **Shoot Date: 17th March**

We’re casting for three paid roles for **HelloFresh** and **Green Chef**.

All roles are **£550**.

Talent must be available to shoot **in London on 17th March**.

Please read the full brief carefully before applying.

**🥗 HelloFresh – Single Mum**

**Female | 30–35**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Warm, relatable, modern energy
* Bright, likeable personality
* Natural on camera
* **Must be a parent**

This role requires genuine “real-life” family moments and comfort featuring your child(ren) in natural home footage.

**🥘 HelloFresh – Dad**

**Male | Mid-30s**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Calm, dependable, trustworthy presence
* Understated confidence
* Natural delivery
* **Must be a parent**

This role includes natural home/lifestyle footage with children.

**💪 Green Chef – Gym Guy / PT**

**Male | Mid-30s**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Credible personal trainer presence
* Grounded, knowledgeable delivery
* Strong on-camera authority
* **Must have active gym access**

Real gym environment required for pre-shoot footage.

## **🎥 B-ROLL REQUIREMENTS (IMPORTANT – ALL TALENT)**

All selected talent must supply lifestyle B-roll to support the edit.

**Pre-Shoot B-Roll (Required):**
* Filmed before shoot day
* Sent in advance
* Maximum 2 hours filming
* Shot list will be provided
* Natural, real-life footage only
* 
**👶 HelloFresh Talent – Children in B-Roll**

* Must be comfortable featuring children in pre-shoot B-roll
* Natural home/lifestyle moments only
* Minor release documentation will be provided if required
## **📌 How to Apply**

Please apply via this form only:

👉 https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScdiH6_ZP7I1xq0OHy6-_jFzGDt2w7oIRwRptlujEUXjLH6Uw/viewform?usp=header

Applications via DM or comments will not be considered.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VOICE OVER ARTIST (MALE, US ACCENT)
We are seeking a male voice artist with an authentic American accent for a powerful and sensitive documentary exploring domestic violence, produced in collaboration with The Purple Project.

The role involves reading a series of poems written by survivors. The performance requires emotional intelligence, and the ability to deliver deeply personal material with authenticity and respect.

Details:

Male voice, natural US accent

Recording in London

Less than half a day’s work

Unpaid (charity collaboration)

This is an opportunity to contribute to an important project amplifying survivor voices and supporting meaningful change.

If interested, please get in touch.

Vicky Boone Casting is looking for Latino men ages 30-50 for a World Cup Academy Sports commercial!

We are looking for:

[SOCCER FAN] Male, 30-50, Latino. Real looks/Dad vibes. Mustache is a plus, but not required. OCP.

Project: Academy Sports + Outdoors
Agency: McGarrah Jessee
Production Company: The Bear
Project Type: Social Media Campaign
Union Status: Non-Union
Project Rate: $500/day
Fitting Rate: $50/hour (if applicable)
Fitting Date(s): March 23 or March 24 (TBD)
Shoot Date(s): March 26 - March 30, 2026 (will likely shoot 1-2 day within this range)
Shoot Location: Austin, TX (and surrounding area). Must work local to Austin.
Term: 3 months from first use date for video and perpetual for stills
—

If you are a fit and interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:

*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned or list conflicts (3/23-3/24 and 3/26-3/30)
*Please use the subject line “SOCCER FAN”

Use: Video usage covers use in social media for 3 months from first air date, includes unlimited edits, lifts, and versions now known or hereafter developed. Usage also covers use of stills for use in: all digital media (including but not limited to: websites, emails, paid/organic social, banners, etc.), in-stores, collateral material, and OOH. Still usage is perpetual

We look forward to your submissions!

[We do not give permission to other casting sites to repost this casting call]

– Team VBC

URGENT Casting Call for 5 Italian Nonnas – PAID 1-Day Coffee Commercial in LA
Hi everyone! We’re urgently looking to cast five older women to play Italian nonnas in a documentary-style commercial for a franchise coffee brand.

This is a sweet, natural, conversational role — NO FORMAL ACTING EXPERIENCE NEEDED.

📍 Location: Los Angeles County
📅 Shoot Date: Thursday, March 5, 2026
⏰ Approx. 12-hour day, call time TBD
💵 Paid gig - $300+, Travel WILL be covered
🍽 Food will be provided on set

What we’re looking for:
- Women 60 years or older
- Comfortable speaking Italian, you do NOT need to be fluent
- Just able to pronounce Italian clearly and read a few short lines

If you’re interested (or know someone who would be perfect!), please email:

📩 connect@intrasithcollective.com

Including:
-A recent photo of yourself that shows you from head to toe
-Your current hometown (For travel considerations)
-A contact phone number

Please reach out ASAP if you’re interested!

Thank you so much

items.text:
Casting Opportunity: Teenage Male Actors 🎬
We are currently casting teenage male actors for an upcoming episode. Experience is not required. Even if you have zero acting background, you are welcome to audition. What matters most is your energy, commitment, and willingness to jump in.

This episode includes a variety of physical and outdoor activities. To be considered, you must be comfortable with the following:

• Kayaking 🚣

• Swimming 🌊

• Rock diving 🪨

• Rock climbing 🧗

• Hiking 🥾

• Running 🏃

• Tug-of-war 💪

• Tag

• Bats 🦇

• Horror-style elements 🎥

This episode will actively showcase all of these activities, so it is important that you are genuinely comfortable participating in them.

A parent or guardian must be present on set at all times unless the actor is 18 years of age or older.

If you’re ready for an adventurous, high-energy filming experience, we’d love to hear from you.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'HOCUS POCUS: TE MINISERIES EPISODE 16 CAMP SALEM LAKE CASTING NOTICE FILMING DATE APRIL 25, 2026 CALL TIME 8:30 AM LOCATION SHELBY, NORTH CAROLINA SEEKING LEONARD Male, 13-18 Must participate in camp activities and appear throughout the full episode BECKET Male, 13-18 Must participate in camp activities and appear throughout the full episode If18 18, must convincingly portray younger. Open to all races and ethnicities. TO SUBMIT: SUBMISSION DEADLINE MARCH 8, 2026 Contact via Facebook or Email: RPAULLEY0415@yahoo.com if roles are not cast by the deadline, characters may be rewritten.'

Hello friends!

I'm helping my wonderful film student look for a last-minute replacement actor for his final Stream Project in the Foundation Program at the Vancouver Film School.

**MUST BE NON-UNION!**

***Do-yoon**** (Lead) Gender: Man Age: 20’s-30’s A tightly wound young man suffocating under the heavy weight of familial expectations. Beneath his outwardly blank and medicated exterior lies a fragile but defiant spirit, desperate for the right moment to shatter his constraints and release his true voice.*

This movie shoots on MARCH 9th and on MARCH 12th*.*

*If interested, please contact**** *****Ayden Rhee:** rhee.joon1@gmail.com

Thank you!

=)

items.text:
**SHORT FILM CASTING CALL - “TAKEAWAYS”**

**OPEN TO UNION & NON-UNION - VOLUNTEER/UNPAID**

**DIRECTOR:** Jamie Lam

**CATEGORY:** Independent Short Film - UBCP ULB. Funded by BC Arts Council. 

**CASTING DIRECTOR:** Cathy Huynh

**COMPENSATION:** Volunteer/Unpaid. Food provided on set. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**FILMING DATES/LOCATION:** March 21-22, 2026 (TBC) / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **takeawaysfilm@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable)

**LOGLINE:** A reluctant young boy working at his family’s restaurant learns to step up as his father quietly falls apart after a loss.

**ANDY — Male, 10-15, Chinese or East Asian-identifying.** Smart but apathetic, Andy is tired of helping out at the family restaurant, much rather preferring to play PC games at home. Even so, he takes after his dad Sam, embodying kindness and warmth when times get tough - **LEAD. CANTONESE PROFICIENCY IS A PLUS.**

**FEMALE CUSTOMER — Female, 35-45, Chinese or East Asian-identifying.** This female customers a regular at Sam’s restaurant. While paying for her food, she praises Andy for being such a well-brought up kid. **CANTONESE PROFICIENCY IS A PLUS. **

**TV DRAMA ACTOR - Male, 25-35, Chinese or East-Asian identifying. **This television actor is seen in a romantic Chinese drama.** MUST BE FLUENT IN CANTONESE. MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH A KISSING SCENE. **FYI THIS ROLE SHOOTS BEFORE MARCH 20TH!**

**TV DRAMA ACTRESS - Female, 25-35, Chinese or East-Asian identifying. **This television actress is seen in a romantic Chinese drama.** MUST BE FLUENT IN CANTONESE. MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH A KISSING SCENE. **FYI THIS ROLE SHOOTS BEFORE MARCH 20TH!**

items.summary:
**SHORT FILM CASTING CALL - “TAKEAWAYS”**

**OPEN TO UNION & NON-UNION - VOLUNTEER/UNPAID**

**DIRECTOR:** Jamie Lam

**CATEGORY:** Independent Short Film - UBCP ULB. Funded by BC Arts Council. 

**CASTING DIRECTOR:** Cathy Huynh

**COMPENSATION:** Volunteer/Unpaid. Food provided on set. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**FILMING DATES/LOCATION:** March 21-22, 2026 (TBC) / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **takeawaysfilm@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable)

**LOGLINE:** A reluctant young boy working at his family’s restaurant learns to step up as his father quietly falls apart after a loss.

**ANDY — Male, 10-15, Chinese or East Asian-identifying.** Smart but apathetic, Andy is tired of helping out at the family restaurant, much rather preferring to play PC games at home. Even so, he takes after his dad Sam, embodying kindness and warmth when times get tough - **LEAD. CANTONESE PROFICIENCY IS A PLUS.**

**FEMALE CUSTOMER — Female, 35-45, Chinese or East Asian-identifying.** This female customers a regular at Sam’s restaurant. While paying for her food, she praises Andy for being such a well-brought up kid. **CANTONESE PROFICIENCY IS A PLUS. **

**TV DRAMA ACTOR - Male, 25-35, Chinese or East-Asian identifying. **This television actor is seen in a romantic Chinese drama.** MUST BE FLUENT IN CANTONESE. MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH A KISSING SCENE. **FYI THIS ROLE SHOOTS BEFORE MARCH 20TH!**

**TV DRAMA ACTRESS - Female, 25-35, Chinese or East-Asian identifying. **This television actress is seen in a romantic Chinese drama.** MUST BE FLUENT IN CANTONESE. MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH A KISSING SCENE. **FYI THIS ROLE SHOOTS BEFORE MARCH 20TH!**

items.title: JOIN SELFCAST -  CASTING MADE EASY !!!

items.text:
NYT OPSLAG

Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (til DR) søges 

Få ledige mandlige statistroller i alder 25-50 år til statistrolle som funktionær til en fest i en togvogn Mariager-Handest, MEN med kostume/sminke dag i Skovlunde på Sjælland d. onsdag d. 4/3 et aftalt tidsrum ml. 9.30 - 15.30 (pause 11.30-13.15)

Der er kun en plads tirsdag eftermiddag og en torsdag formiddag ledig.

Se krav nederst fra Sminke og Kostume pga. perioden 1950-60erne samt tilgængelige kostumer på lager fra den periode.
Du skal ramme indenfor skiven ;-) 

FRA JYLLAND (ELLER FYN):
Produktionen dækker transport til kostume/sminkeprøven på en af disse måder
1. Bro og benzin fra bopæl til Skovlunde og retur. Alternativt en lavpris færgeovergang t/r tilsvarende prisen for broafgift.
2. En lavpris bus- eller togbillet. Der kører offentlige bus fra Skovlunde st. til adressen i Mileparken.
Der er gratis anvist parkering hos Filmgear Mileparken.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport på optagelsesdagene dækkes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger dækkes ikke.
Derudover er der et personligt honorar for kostume/sminkedagen samt et tilpasset antal optagedage. Se nedenfor

Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdagene
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 til en fest i Handest. 

Der er i alt til hver 2400 kr. honorar for 2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. Det er inkl. transporttiden.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte/bukser på eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, hårlængde min. ca. 8 cm så der kan laves sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg, du skal kunne se uden briller.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.

Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

Oplys hvad du forventer af pris for transport til/fra Skovlunde på kostume/sminkedagen.

PILNIE POSZUKUJEMY!! 🎬 | ŁÓDŹ
TERMIN ZDJĘĆ: 11-13 marca 

Do III-rocznej etiudy operatorskiej szukamy:
   • kierownika planu
   • dyżurnego (11-12 marca)
   • II kostiumografa 
   • realizatora dźwięku 
   • II oświetlacza (13 marca)
   • fotosisty

🎞️ LOGLINE
Po nagłej i niezrozumiałej stracie, która jeszcze bardziej ich od siebie oddala, dwoje rodziców staje w milczeniu nad granicą między winą, a potrzebą bliskości. 

Oferta non-profit‼️

📩 Zainteresowanych proszę o kontakt:
mail: p.struminska@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

items.text:
#żarliwachirurżka

Czy zgodzisz się wziąć udział w wyzwaniu z językołamaczem/łamańcem językowym? 

Oto językołamacz:

Chirurżka urżnęła dramaturżce pęcherzyk żółciowy i wyszczerbiła szczypczyki na trzustce architektki, a mieszczce spiesznie w szczęce poprzemieszczała trzonowce.
„Acz tkliwych jelitek tkaczki nie tykaj!” - łka adiunktka.
„Jeszcze zniszczę zmarszczki szwaczki!” - odszczekuje zapaleńczyni.
„Cóż za żarliwość” szepcze psychiatrka do pediatrki.

Język polski językołamaczami stoi! Bawmy się nowym łamańcem, który powstał dzięki powrotowi feminatywów do języka polskiego 🙂

items.summary:
#żarliwachirurżka

Czy zgodzisz się wziąć udział w wyzwaniu z językołamaczem/łamańcem językowym? 

Oto językołamacz:

Chirurżka urżnęła dramaturżce pęcherzyk żółciowy i wyszczerbiła szczypczyki na trzustce architektki, a mieszczce spiesznie w szczęce poprzemieszczała trzonowce.
„Acz tkliwych jelitek tkaczki nie tykaj!” - łka adiunktka.
„Jeszcze zniszczę zmarszczki szwaczki!” - odszczekuje zapaleńczyni.
„Cóż za żarliwość” szepcze psychiatrka do pediatrki.

Język polski językołamaczami stoi! Bawmy się nowym łamańcem, który powstał dzięki powrotowi feminatywów do języka polskiego 🙂
items.title: #żarliwachirurżka

sharedPost.text:
Witajcie w świecie profesjonalnego ratownictwa! Poznajcie ROB-RESCUE 🚑🛡️

Z wielką dumą ogłaszamy start naszej oficjalnej strony! ROB-RESCUE to nie tylko firma – to zespół pasjonatów i profesjonalistów, dla których ratowanie życia i zdrowia to codzienna misja, realizowana na lądzie, w wodzie i w warunkach podwyższonego ryzyka.

Dlaczego warto nas obserwować?
Bo zmieniamy podejście do bezpieczeństwa. Nie tylko reagujemy na wypadki – my im aktywnie zapobiegamy dzięki naszym unikalnym patrolom ratowniczym, które eliminują zagrożenia, zanim staną się problemem.

W czym możemy Ci pomóc?

🚑 Transport Medyczny: Bezpieczny przewóz pacjentów w kraju i w całej Europie – komfort i opieka na najwyższym poziomie.

⚡ Medycyna Pola Walki & TCCC: Przenosimy doświadczenie taktyczne na grunt szkoleń. Uczymy, jak działać w sytuacjach ekstremalnych.

🛡️ Zabezpieczenia Medyczne: Kompleksowa obsługa eventów, koncertów i zawodów sportowych.

🌊 Ratownictwo Wodne: Profesjonalne zabezpieczenie akwenów i imprez nad wodą.

🎓 Szkolenia Pierwszej Pomocy: Praktyczna wiedza, która daje pewność działania w każdej sekundzie.

Nasz Cel: Twoje bezpieczeństwo. Zawsze krok przed zagrożeniem.

Zostań z nami, aby otrzymywać dawkę ratowniczej wiedzy, śledzić nasze realizacje i dowiedzieć się, jak możemy pomóc Twojej firmie lub bliskim.

👇 Masz pytanie? Potrzebujesz zabezpieczenia lub transportu?
📞 Zadzwoń: (+48 )577-911-340
✉️ Napisz: rob.medrescue@gmail.com

items.text:
Hi guys! 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. Needs to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. 

Also looking for another male role 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. 

Please comment below and I will send more info in DMs. I can’t post any more details on here due to NDA’s but can give more info on a call. Get in touch ASAP please!

topComments.text: Usually, things that carry NDAs are handled by a legit casting agency. Which one do you work for? Is it your own? What is the agency name?nPlease be upfront here with agency name - don't just ask people to DM you - that rings warning bells. Giving the agency name is perfectly safe - if you are genuine.

items.text:
DO YOUR KIDS LIKE TO PLAY SOCCER?👟⚽️

Vicky Boone Casting is looking for Latino/Latina kids, ages 8-15 with soccer skills for principal roles in an Academy Sports commercial!

Project: Academy Sports + Outdoors
Agency: McGarrah Jessee
Production Company: The Bear
Project Type: Social Media Campaign
Union Status: Non-Union
Project Rate: $500/day
Fitting Rate: $50/hour (if applicable)
Shoot Date(s): March 26 - March 30, 2026 (will likely shoot 1-2 day within this range)
Fitting Date(s): March 23 or March 24 (TBD)
Shoot Location: Austin, TX (and surrounding area). Must work local to Austin.
Term: 3 months from first use date for video and perpetual for stills
—

We are looking for:
[SOCCER KIDS] - Male or Female, Ages 8-15, Latino/Latina. Real looks. Strong soccer skills.

If your kid might be a fit and you are interested in submitting them, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:

*Child’s Name
*Age
*City you live in
*Parent’s Name
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos of your kid
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned or list conflicts (3/23-3/24 and 3/26-3/30)
*Tell us a little bit about their soccer experience
*Please use the subject line “SUMMER SOCCER KID”

Use: Video usage covers use in social media for 3 months from first air date, includes unlimited edits, lifts, and versions now known or hereafter developed. Usage also covers use of stills for use in: all digital media (including but not limited to: websites, emails, paid/organic social, banners, etc.), in-stores, collateral material, and OOH. Still usage is perpetual

We look forward to your submissions!

[We do not give permission to other casting sites to repost this casting call]

– Team VBC

Last Minute Casting Call!

A Capilano University student film production is in need of two young female actors who are willing to smoke herbal cigarettes.

Callbacks would take place on March 2nd in North Vancouver, and a self-tape would be required before callbacks.

Shooting dates are March 13th, 14th and 15th.

 

Please email christinahodges@my.capilanou.ca for sides and if more details are required.

items.previewDescription: Historische Dokumentationen, Reenactment und Bildungsprojekte aus Weinheim/Mannheim/Heidelberg. Mit Schülern, Schauspielern & Zeitzeugen machen wir Geschichte lebendig – jetzt Filme ansehen & mitwirken Filmemacher aus Mannheim für historische Dokumentationen und Reenacting

sharedPost.text:
Für eine Hauptrolle in unserer historischen Dokumentation über Elisabeth Auguste (Kurfürstin, 18. Jahrhundert) suchen wir dringend einen männlichen Darsteller (ehrenamtlich).

Zur Rolle:
Gesucht wird ein Mann bis ca. 45–50 Jahre für die Rolle eines Offiziers (Kontext: Erster Koalitionskrieg) sowie Geliebter von Elisabeth Auguste. Es handelt sich um eine zentrale, wiederkehrende Figur.

Dreh & Zeitaufwand:

insgesamt ca. 7 Drehtage im Jahr 2026
erster Drehtermin: 07. März 2026 in Bensheim
weitere Drehs voraussichtlich in Mannheim, Weinheim und Heidelberg
Wichtig: Die Mitwirkung ist ehrenamtlich (unbezahlt).

Wenn du Interesse hast oder jemanden kennst, der passen könnte, freuen wir uns über eine kurze Nachricht (gern mit Foto/kurzer Vorstellung und ggf. Schauspielerfahrung).

items.text:
👋 Hallo zusammen,

ich bin **Existenzgründungsberater** und unterstütze Menschen dabei, **strukturiert und gefördert in die Selbstständigkeit** zu starten – je nach Situation z. B. über den **Gründungszuschuss der Agentur für Arbeit** oder über passende Fördermöglichkeiten im Zusammenhang mit dem **Jobcenter**.

Warum ich hier poste:
In vielen Gruppen rund um Selbstständigkeit sehe ich, dass viele mit einer guten Idee starten wollen, aber oft an denselben Punkten hängen:
* **Welche Förderung kommt überhaupt infrage?**
* **Welche Voraussetzungen müssen erfüllt sein?**
* **Wie gehe ich den Antrag richtig an?**
* **Wo fange ich am besten an, ohne Zeit zu verlieren?**

Genau dabei unterstütze ich.
Mein Fokus:

✅ Klarheit über Fördermöglichkeiten (Agentur für Arbeit / Jobcenter)
✅ Strukturierter Start in die Selbstständigkeit
✅ Unterstützung bei der Vorbereitung von Förderanträgen
✅ Orientierung zu Voraussetzungen, Ablauf und nächsten Schritten
Dein Vorteil (kurz auf den Punkt):

➡️ **mehr Klarheit** statt Informationschaos
➡️ **weniger Fehler** bei Vorbereitung und Antrag
➡️ **mehr Sicherheit** beim Start in die Selbstständigkeit
➡️ **schneller ins Handeln kommen** mit einem klaren Plan

Wenn du gerade über den Schritt in die Selbstständigkeit nachdenkst oder bereits gestartet bist und wissen möchtest, welche Möglichkeiten es für deinen Fall gibt, kannst du mir gern eine **PN** schreiben.
Auch Gruppenadmins oder Unternehmer:innen, die das Thema für ihre Community interessant finden, dürfen sich gerne melden. 🤝

Viele Grüße

items.text:
LAS VEGAS WRITERS WANTED – Sketch Comedy Collective (Paid Per Idea)

Hello Vegas creatives 

We’re building and running a low-budget sketch comedy group here in Las Vegas, and I’m currently looking for writers who want to help shape the creative direction from the ground up.

The Mission:

To entertain and educate.

We’ll be filming short skits and sketches (primarily on iPhones) that blend humor with substance.

We’re looking for writers who can pitch original sketch ideas in one of three categories:

 1. Generally Comedic – Pure humor, absurdity, satire, character-driven bits, etc.

 2. Politically Charged – Comedic sketches with ironic undertones (smart satire, not lazy outrage).

 3. Social Issue-Based – Commentary on real-world topics, delivered through humor and irony.

The tone we’re aiming for: clever, self-aware, bold, ironic, not preachy.

💰 Compensation

This is a paid independent contractor position.

This is not hourly.

Writers will be paid per green-lit concept.

Pay structure (open to compromise):

 • $75 per approved sketch concept

A “green-lit concept” should include:

 • Clear premise

 • Character breakdown

 • Beginning / escalation / punchline structure

 • Intended tone (comedic, political satire, social irony)

 • 1–2 pages max

Not just:

“What if a politician was secretly a DoorDash driver?”

(That’s not worth $75.)

 • Potential bonuses if the sketch performs well online

 • Opportunity for ongoing collaboration if there’s creative consistency and chemistry

We can scale pay upward as the group monetizes and grows. 

⚠️ Important

Concepts must be original and primarily human-developed.

AI may be used lightly for dialogue polishing or minor assistance, but not for generating the core concept or premise.

🎥 Production Style

 • Shot on iPhones

 • Fast turnaround

 • Character-driven

 • Low budget but high creativity

 • Consistent releases

If you’re a writer who:

 • Has sharp comedic instincts

 • Isn’t afraid to tackle real issues through irony

 • Understands pacing and short-form content

 • Wants to build something long-term

Drop a comment or DM Kenyon Wellington

topComments.text: Definitely interested in writing comedy sketches!
Hello Kenyon Wellington. I hope you’re well. I just tried sending you a dm, but it says your messenger doesn’t accept dm’s from unknown users.

items.text:
ACTORS NEEDED

Montclair State University (NJ). 

Tony Pemberton’s Film 111 Directing Workshop 

Thursdays, March 5, 19, 26, 2026

2 sessions: 
1:00pm - 4:20pm
5:30pm - 8:45pm

VOLUNTEER your time to help budding directors learn communication skills with actors, and gain experience of what it’s like being on set. Raw footage of what you film will be provided, plus relationships with 15-20 new directors will be established.

DM me with your 
PHONE 
EMAIL
WEBSITE/ACTORS ACCESS/BACKSTAGE link and/or INSTAGRAM

And let me know if: 

you can do either or both sessions: 1:00pm - 4:20pm
5:30pm - 8:45pm

on which of these dates: Thursdays, March 5, 19, 26

Free parking passes will be provided. Or the NJ Transit bus and train go right to campus from Manhattan or from other parts of NJ.

items.text:
🎬 Statyści – Na dobre i na złe
📅 Data: 4 marca 
📍 Miejsce Zbiórki: Warszawa Falenica 
💰 Stawka: 100 zł płatne gotówką 
🎭 Kogo szukają + Godziny wiek

Plan A Prawnicy 6.45 - 12.30 Mężczyźni wiek 45-55 na prawników własne eleganckie ubrania 

Plan B Przychodnia prywatna 12.30 - 18.00 osoby wiek 30-60  zadbani elegnacy pacjenci prywatnej przychodni

Plan C Policjanci 13.00 - 18.00 mężczyźni około 35 - 45 na policjantów minimum 177 cm wzrostu 

Wymagania ogólne 
Osoby z Warszawy lub bliskiej okolicy
Osoby które nie grają w szpitalu w Falenicy

📧 Zgłoszenia wysyłać na: statysci.nadobre@gmail.com
W treści maila należy podać:
Imię i nazwisko
Numer telefonu
Wiek
Wzrost 
1–2 aktualne zdjęcia
Dopisek: Wybrać na który plan się państwo kwalifikuja 
Odezwiemy się JUTRO do wybranych osób 
Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do jutra do 12.00

items.text:
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 
Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.
