items.text:
Hi FIND-ers! The Women in Film and Media Colorado annual Industry Fair is this weekend! We are celebrating our 10 year anniversary this year and things are bigger and better than ever! Lunch is included with your ticket each day! Link in the comments to get your tickets. If Cost is an issue, please reach out and we can figure something out!

Opening Night   | February 27 | 7 pm 

Start the Industry Fair the best way possible— with a drink in hand and a room full of filmmakers ready to connect. Join us for the Opening Night Cocktail Party at [Cabin House Studios](https://www.cabinhousestudios.com/), featuring powerhouse Miranda Bailey in conversation—a candid, energizing chat packed with real-world insight and creative momentum.

Day 1 | February 28 | 9am - 6pm

Community College of Aurora
9075 E Lowry Blvd, Denver, CO 80230

Dive into developing and marketing a vertical/web series, sharpen your interview looks with Mary Jeanes & Cheshire Li or learn insider tips on freelancing from Shawna Schultz.   Prefer hands-on storytelling? Jump into a two-part scene lab or catch a directing workshop with a Hollywood director Sarah Adina Smith. Spend the afternoon discovering the ins and outs of festivals with Eileen O'Brien, learn about Colorado’s refundable tax credit or check out the detailed craft of special effects makeup with Stephanie Lane and Michelle Knoebel. Wrap the day with industry insights on the director/casting director relationship with Nell Teare and Jamie Castro and a final panel on "Breaking IN: How did you do that?

Day 2 | March 1 | 9am - 6pm

Learn the *Principles of Film Adaptation with *Trai Cartwright, *Audition Techniques from a TV & Film Casting Director with Jamie Castro Casting* or jump into hands-on sessions like *Scene Lab Day 2*. The afternoon keeps the momentum going with a short documentary session with Jenna Red, filmmaking career strategy with Roe Moore, *Best Practices for Auditions & Callbacks with Intimacy* and everyone’s favorite stunts workshop with Sara Salazar & friends.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'INDUSTRV FAIR WOMEN IN FILM & ILM&MEDIA MEDIA -Colorado FEB 27- MAR 2026 OUR ANNUAL WEEKEND OF HANDS-ONWORKSHOPS, HANDS-ON WORKSHOPS, INDUSTRY PANELS AND COLORADO FILM COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS. PASSES ON SALE NOW! www.wifmco.org/industry-fai-2026 2026 COMMUNITY COLLEGE of AURORA cabin house #개체하의'

items.text:
**Castingaufruf für studentischen Kurzfilm (Tübinale)**

Meine studentische Filmgruppe sucht Darsteller*innen für einen ca. 6-minütigen Kurzfilm, der im Rahmen der Tübinale entsteht. Gedreht wird in der Fildergegend nahe Stuttgart. Der genaue Drehzeitraum wird noch bekannt gegeben.

**Logline:**
Als eine junge Frau beginnt, ihre Beziehung mit einem anderen Paar zu vergleichen, verliert sie den Blick für die Liebe, die direkt vor ihr steht.

**Gesuchte Rollen (alle ca. 19–25 Jahre):**

**Weibliche Hauptrolle**
Junge Frau in ihrer ersten ernsthaften Beziehung. Unsicher, emotional offen, stark von äußeren Erwartungen und Vergleichen beeinflusst. Die Rolle erfordert ein sensibles Spiel innerer Konflikte und leiser emotionaler Veränderungen.

**Männliche Hauptrolle**
Ihr Freund. Bodenständig, ruhig und bemüht. Er liebt ehrlich, gerät aber zunehmend unter Druck, weil er den Erwartungen seiner Partnerin nicht gerecht werden kann. Subtiles, zurückgenommenes Spiel ist wichtig.

**Weibliche Nebenrolle**
Junge Frau mit perfekter Außenwirkung. Kontrolliert und diszipliniert, privat jedoch angespannt. Die Rolle lebt vom Kontrast zwischen äußerer Kontrolle und innerer Unsicherheit.

**Männliche Nebenrolle**
Charismatisch, dominant, stark auf Außenwirkung bedacht. Kontrollierend und schnell reizbar. Muss zwischen Charme und unterschwelliger Bedrohlichkeit wechseln können.

Schauspielerfahrung ist willkommen, aber keine Voraussetzung. Wichtig sind Verlässlichkeit, Lust auf Spielen und Interesse an einem emotionalen, beziehungszentrierten Stoff.
Bei Interesse einfach eine Nachricht schreiben, dann schicken wir weitere Infos und das Drehbuch.

items.summary:
**Castingaufruf für studentischen Kurzfilm (Tübinale)**

Meine studentische Filmgruppe sucht Darsteller*innen für einen ca. 6-minütigen Kurzfilm, der im Rahmen der Tübinale entsteht. Gedreht wird in der Fildergegend nahe Stuttgart. Der genaue Drehzeitraum wird noch bekannt gegeben.

**Logline:**
Als eine junge Frau beginnt, ihre Beziehung mit einem anderen Paar zu vergleichen, verliert sie den Blick für die Liebe, die direkt vor ihr steht.

**Gesuchte Rollen (alle ca. 19–25 Jahre):**

**Weibliche Hauptrolle**
Junge Frau in ihrer ersten ernsthaften Beziehung. Unsicher, emotional offen, stark von äußeren Erwartungen und Vergleichen beeinflusst. Die Rolle erfordert ein sensibles Spiel innerer Konflikte und leiser emotionaler Veränderungen.

**Männliche Hauptrolle**
Ihr Freund. Bodenständig, ruhig und bemüht. Er liebt ehrlich, gerät aber zunehmend unter Druck, weil er den Erwartungen seiner Partnerin nicht gerecht werden kann. Subtiles, zurückgenommenes Spiel ist wichtig.

**Weibliche Nebenrolle**
Junge Frau mit perfekter Außenwirkung. Kontrolliert und diszipliniert, privat jedoch angespannt. Die Rolle lebt vom Kontrast zwischen äußerer Kontrolle und innerer Unsicherheit.

**Männliche Nebenrolle**
Charismatisch, dominant, stark auf Außenwirkung bedacht. Kontrollierend und schnell reizbar. Muss zwischen Charme und unterschwelliger Bedrohlichkeit wechseln können.

Schauspielerfahrung ist willkommen, aber keine Voraussetzung. Wichtig sind Verlässlichkeit, Lust auf Spielen und Interesse an einem emotionalen, beziehungszentrierten Stoff.
Bei Interesse einfach eine Nachricht schreiben, dann schicken wir weitere Infos und das Drehbuch.

items.text:
*PAID OPPORTUNITY: CALLING DIRECTORS & DIRECTORS OF PHOTOGRAPHY (DOPs) for "Fires in the Heather" Proof of Concept*

We are seeking a visionary Director and a skilled  Director of Photography (DOP) for a paid opportunity to bring a pivotal scene or two from our new screenplay, “Fires in the Heather," to life.

**About the Project:**
"Fires in the Heather" is an evocative drama fantasy inspired by a compelling real story. Our goal is to produce a high-quality proof-of-concept piece (1-2 scenes) to showcase our artistic vision and secure investment for the full feature film. This is a unique opportunity to shape the foundational visual and narrative style of a truly impactful story.

Project Details:

Title: 
Fires in the Heather

Genre: 
Drama Fantasy (inspired by a real story)

Objective: 
Create 1-2 scenes for a proof-of-concept for potential investment.

Compensation: 
This is a paid position. Budget details are pending and will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Location:
Sussex area, UK. Candidates based in or able to work in this region are preferred.

Further Information:
You can learn more about the project at https://ohwafilm.com/one-pager/fires-in-the-heather/

Who We Are Looking For:

1. Director:
We seek an experienced Director with a strong visual style, a profound understanding of narrative storytelling, and a passion for drama fantasy. You should be adept at guiding performances and translating a screenplay into compelling cinematic sequences. Experience with proof-of-concept or short film production is beneficial.

2. Director of Photography (DOP):**
We are searching for a talented DOP with a keen eye for composition, lighting, and cinematic atmosphere. Your portfolio should demonstrate your ability to craft visually stunning images that enhance dramatic and fantastical elements. Experience working collaboratively with a director to achieve a cohesive vision is essential.

To Apply:
Interested Directors and DOPs are invited to submit their professional portfolios, showreels, and a brief statement outlining their interest in "Fires in the Heather."

Please send all submissions to our Producer:
Susan Rutledge
Email: susan@ohwafilm.com

Confidentiality:
A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) will be digitally sent out to candidates whose portfolios align with our vision to facilitate the sharing of the full script and other relevant documentation.

Further Casting:
Please stay tuned for future casting announcements for actors and other crew roles.

We look forward to reviewing your work and potentially collaborating on "Fires in the Heather." Thank you for your interest.

items.title: OUT NOW!🎉🎶

sharedPost.text:
Suche immer noch eine Sängerin (gerne auch Amateurin) für meine Songs. Ich biete die Stücke, die Musik und die Aufnahme. Um sich regelmäßig treffen zu können, wäre eine räumliche Nähe zu Großhansdorf schon gut. Wäre schön von dir zu hören. 
Wäre hilfreich, wenn ihr die Anzeige teilen würdet. LG Werner

Casting Call!

Casting an unpaid student short film that will be shooting March 26-28! Contact me for more information. All roles are listed below and here is a link to the audition form. https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfeJE5nTSeCVr6sMQ10mt5IU6aI9rUTsSmyLs436VPidNi6eA/viewform

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says "AUDITIONS MARCH 10TH!!! mens CASTING CALL!!! SARAYA (YOUNG BLACK WOMAN): FACING PREJUDICE IN HOSPITALS AFTER DEVELOPING A CHRONIC ILLNESS THAT DOCTORS WONT TREAT HER FOR, SHE TURNS to AN AL TERNATIVE DOCTOR TOR FOR HELP. THE IS SLOW To START HELPING AND WHEN T DOES SHE FEELS LIKE SHE'S MISSING SOMETHING. ELI (YOUNG MAN): RECEPTIONIST FOR DR DOLON. DEFINITELY NITELY DOESN'T WANT to BE THERE AND ACTIVELY IGNORING HIS JOB DR DOLON (OLD WHITE MAN): DOCTOR HAT PRACTICES ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE. GIVES SARAYA SPECIAL MEDICINE THAT SHOULD HELP HER ILLNESS. AUDITIONS MARCH 10TH!!! IN ANNEX 139E 6PM AUDITION AUDITIONFORM FORM"

Casting an unpaid student short film that will be shooting March 26-28! Contact me for more information. All roles are listed below and here is a link to the audition form. https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfeJE5nTSeCVr6sMQ10mt5IU6aI9rUTsSmyLs436VPidNi6eA/viewform
items.title: Casting Call!

items.text:
Casting call for the Indie Short HOTLINE 

TITLE: HOTLINE 

GENRE: Dark Comedy, Absurd 

LOGLINE: When a chaotic former phone sex operator and her too self-controlled coworker hide from an active shooter at their New Year’s Eve office party in a suicide hotline center, they must find a way to stay alive while helping callers do the same. 

ROLES: Need two actresses for both drama and comedy in a B&W short like ROMY & MICHELLE meets WAITING FOR GODOT in a tone similar to KINDS OF KINDNESS or VIRGIN SUICIDES.

SERENA: (Female, 40s, heart of a CEO but stuck in admin, Ali Wong type) Serena’s decisive, competent and moral but maybe a little repressed. Rapid fire dialogue with a light touch, screwball physical comedy, flashes of panic amid bold leadership. 

ROXANE: (Female, 30s, former phone sex operator, Merritt Wever, Jennifer Coolidge type) Roxane might seem naive and dress like a showgirl but she's also wise, sincere empathetic and earthy. Believably gullible, clueless, light touch, comedic timing.

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Very Normal Productions, LLC. Female director Chelsey Schmidt. Cinefemme is a fiscal sponsor. 

PRODUCTION TYPE: Indie, Student Film

TONE: Dark, absurdist, quirky, offbeat, playful, ironic, screwball, claustrophobic,

 

COMPENSATION: $400 stipend for two shooting days, one zoom table read and two half-day rehearsals tbd. Meals and snacks. Transportation set upon request.

RUN TIME: 15 minutes 

UNION: Non-union

SUBMISSIONS: Please send to verynormalprod@gmail.com by March 8, 2026. [Extended from March 1] We can't respond to all applicants, but will be contacting those selected with next steps. 

• Name and contact info

• Headshot or recent photo

• Resume 

• Reel or self tape dark comedy scene/monologue

• Subject line: HOTLINE CASTING - [your name and role]

• Availability weekends in May and June if unavailable May 16, 17

SHOOTING SCHEDULE: Full weekend in May (16, 17)

FILMING LOCATION: Denver/Boulder area, all locations indoors

TW: suicide and active shooter, sexual situations (dialogue only)

Thank you!

items.text:
**ATTENTION ACTORS/READERS!!**

Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole are doing a virtual table read for Emily's feature film script "Marshlights" on Sunday, March 15th from 2-5pm and are in need of actors to read the roles. Emily is seeking feedback for the script so there will be time at the end of the table read for feedback to be given by the actors. Table read is not a guarantee of casting if the film gets made in the future. 

If you are interested in participating, please see the summary and character descriptions and submission instructions below. Please only submit for roles you feel you could portray accurately. 

Roles will be cast on a first come, first serve basis. 

**The narration role and the role of Mrs. Ashford have already been cast.**

Marshlights Table Read

WHERE: Online via zoom. Link will be sent to those cast a few days before the read. 

WHEN: Sunday, March 15th @ 2-5pm

WHO: Written by Emily Stephens, Casting by Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole

PROJECT NAME: Marshlights (91 pages)

SUMMARY: The revelation of a young trans woman in a small post-reconstruction town in South Carolina causes confusion and ultimately a showdown with local white supremacist theology leading to a violent reckoning.

CHARACTERS:

 

**Luke/Lucy** (white/early 20s, trans actors are encouraged to submit):  a trans woman who is the child of an aristocratic line, her father a Colonel from the civil war. She's curious, and (post-transition) lively even flirtatious.

**Mark** (black/mid 20s): a constant servant for Lucy and her family. He is deeply loyal and kind. He accepts Lucy's transition and does his best to protect her.

**Esau **(white/early 20s): Lucy's best friend and son of the local pastor. Esau wrestles endlessly with Luke/Lucy who he loves and the expectations and fragility of his own masculinity.

**Pastor Green** (white/late 40s): a deeply patriarchal true believer of a white supremacist theology that grants the town his version of order.

**Colonel Ashford** (white/late 50s): former civil war Colonel and very rigid man with a distinct conception of masculinity defined through labor and sweat.

**Mahala** (black/late 50s): former slave and a major part of the black community. Honest and powerful keeper of community memory and folklore.

**Amos**(black/30s): a seminary trainee black preacher who acts as the less folkloric spiritual leader. Hard working to support his community and it's elders.

**Mrs. Prioleau**(black/40s): keeper of community after Mahala's death. Focused on keeping her community safe.

**Saint Lucia** (mythic): the literal embodiment of the saint appears to help Lucy be revealed. She is disconnected from time.

There are number of smaller or unnamed characters for small scenes, the readers of Saint Lucia and Mrs. Prioleau will cover those roles. 

SUBMIT TO: marybetheversole@gmail.com with YOUR NAME, YOUR EMAIL, THE ROLE YOU ARE SUBMITTING FOR, and if you can commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. 

**Please do not submit if you cannot commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. **

**Please only submit to roles you feel you could portray accurately.**

items.text:
Servus zusammen 🙂

ich möchte euch einen kleinen Einblick in ein freies Filmprojekt geben, das überwiegend mit **engagierten Komparsen und Laiendarstellern** entstanden ist.

Viele, die sonst im Hintergrund stehen, haben hier größere Rollen übernommen — und genau das macht für mich den Reiz solcher Projekte aus. Mit wenig Budget, viel Improvisation und echter Spielfreude ist ein Film entstanden, der vor allem vom Teamgeist lebt.

Ein großes Dankeschön an alle Mitwirkenden — ohne euch gäbe es solche Projekte nicht.

Wer mag, kann gerne mal reinschauen 🙂

Wir sind auf YouTube. „Familie Brandl Comedy“ hier der Link.
👉 https://youtu.be/ndAtSQOVREY?si=9vq-k4j9bFdRwume

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of violin and text that says 'Oma DmaBranat's Branal's Traum'

items.text:
Actors.Can I say something slightly uncomfortable?

The thing that makes you hard to live with…
 is the thing that makes you powerful on screen.

That deep loneliness?

 That ache to be seen?

 That hunger to matter?

That’s not weakness.

That’s your instrument.

Most actors try to “fix” it.
Or hide it.
 Or numb it.

The ones who book?
 They use it.

We’ll be teaching a free class Tuesday March 3rd  on how to find your own magic and bring it to the role.

If you’ve ever:
 – Felt “too much”
 – Felt embarrassed by how badly you want this
 – Wondered why you’re talented but not booking

You’ll want to be there.

LINK: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/88209960827?pwd=5lAKHO7q6BLZzEaCmGaGxORdja9CKq.1
Passcode: ACTING 

Tuesday March 3rd 
12:30 pm pacific 
🇬🇧 United Kingdom
London – 8:30 PM

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'FREE ACTING CLASS Shaye Quinn So grateful for the amazing opportunity to work with you Kirsten Clarkson and Donna-Marie Manninge 6M Like Reply AC Knox Topcontributor 3 days ago Top my agent just texted me.. me........ .... BOOKED THE ROLE HAD MY CALLBACK FOR!!!! 11 24 Stephen Andrew October 2024 recommends Screen Acting School. Screen acting school has SERIOUSLY! helped me take my acting to the next evel, I'm now booking multiple gigs month!'

items.text:
Hi all! I'm producing a non-professional short film that we are now casting for. We'd love to open up this casting to this group and please do feel free to pass it on if you might know someone suitable!

Myself and the team have a few years of HETV and film industry experience so we are looking to tap into all our contacts here, it's going to be a really special production.

We'd love self-tapes by 15th March if you would like to be part of our gorgeous team!

More info on the below website:

https://medicineshortfilm.squarespace.com/casting

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call "Medicine" Short film by Faith Wong ZACK- Lead Actor, male (gender & ethnicity open)- age 19-25 BEN Lead Actor, male (diverse ethnic background) age 19-25 NATALIE Supporting Actor, female (ethnicity open) age 19-25 2x VOICE ONLY Roles- Minimal dialogue (male/female preferred/gender open)- age 19-25 Supporting Artists: PARTY FRIENDS/ FRIENDS/FRISBEE FRISBEE TEAM -Non-speaking/Light Dialogue Supporting Artists: 2x children (1x female age age4-6, 4-6, 1x boy age 5-9) -ages are preferred but not essential'

items.text:
Hi!! I’m a Film Production student at the University of Salford and the director of ‘Lights Out,’ a short university film project🏎️

We’re inviting those interested to send in a short self tape audition - message me here or email @elliejackson1407@gmail.com and i’ll send over the script and more details✨

⭐️CHARACTER DESCRIPTIONS:

DAVID - A retired racing driver and devoted father who believes in Maya‘s talent, but not in motorsports ability to protect her. His protectiveness masks unresolved fear from a past racing accident and failed marriage. He hides behind his work as a mechanic, putting his relationship with his daughter at risk.

SUSIE - A successful racing driver leading a women’s motorsport initiative. Fierce and focused, Susie carries the pressure of representing women in a sport that is waiting for her to fail.

Please check the attached casting call for more information - we’d love to hear from you!✨

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of lighting and text

topComments.text: No such thing as unpaid and urgent and basic expenses includes food and drink and travelling.

MUSICIANS REQUIRED FOR SOUTH KOREA

- Instrumental duet (male & female) (ONLY DUET, NOT SOLO)

Piano & violin, or cello or any other classical string instrument

-Piano & Vocal (male & female) (ONLY DUET, NOT SOLO)

• Venue: 5* Jeju Shilla Hotel, Lobby lounge, bar

• Monthly Salary: $1,700 per person

• Contract Duration: June 1, 2026 ~ August 31, 2026 (with possible extension)

• Performances Schedule: 6 Days per Week, 4 sets x 40 min per Day

• Included: Visa, Round Trip Flight Tickets, Accommodation(close to the hotel), 3 Meals per day

Please apply before February 28, by email: raonfilm23@gmail.com

- 4-5 High quality duet format videos, 8-10 photos, CV with personal information and contact details

items.text: I am happy to announce an acting workshop with top TV creatives. We've chosen these people not only because they have worked on *How To Sell Drugs Online (Fast)*, *Star Trek*, *Science Cops *and *King of Stonks* but they are also GOOD PEOPLE. Held at the lovely  Film Acting School Cologne. Members of the new "Cologne Actors Club" get a discount, as do current students of FAS. Feel free to reach out for more info. Meldet euch gerne für weitere Infos.😃
